title: Rust-authored Browser Edition runtime API stability evidence

support_decision.unsupported_reason: The Rust-authored Browser Edition runtime API remains a preview public lane until ABI major/minor compatibility and downgrade behavior are fully stabilized beyond the maintained fixture.
support_decision.fallback_target: Use the maintained rust-browser-consumer fixture and JS/TS Browser Edition packages for shipped Browser Edition workflows.
decision_rationale: The maintained fixture and builder contracts prove a dispatcher-backed preview lane, not broad stable parity with the shipped JS/TS Browser Edition packages.
Stable promotion remains blocked until ABI semantic-version policy, downgrade guidance, fixture logs, public support wording, and Browser Edition package boundaries are promoted together.
residual_risks: RuntimeBuilder::browser() is artifact-backed but still preview.
ABI version mismatch policy is documented but not promoted to a broad stable external Rust contract.
Native-only browser-impossible surfaces remain unsupported in wasm.

residual_limits: This supplemental contract does not promote the Rust browser runtime lane beyond the artifact-contract-backed preview posture.

validation_commands: env RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_QUEUE_WHEN_BUSY=1 RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=900 rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wasm_rust_browser_profile_matrix_dev cargo test -p asupersync --test wasm_rust_browser_example_contract --features test-internals,wasm-browser-dev rust_browser_runtime_builder_public_api_contract_compiles_under_canonical_profile -- --nocapture

env RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_QUEUE_WHEN_BUSY=1 RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=900 rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wasm_rust_browser_profile_matrix_prod cargo test -p asupersync --test wasm_rust_browser_example_contract --features test-internals,wasm-browser-prod rust_browser_runtime_builder_public_api_contract_compiles_under_canonical_profile -- --nocapture

env RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_QUEUE_WHEN_BUSY=1 RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=900 rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_wasm_rust_browser_profile_matrix_minimal cargo test -p asupersync --test wasm_rust_browser_example_contract --features test-internals,wasm-browser-minimal rust_browser_runtime_builder_public_api_contract_compiles_under_canonical_profile -- --nocapture
residual_limits: Canonical profile coverage proves the preview builder contract compiles under every browser feature profile but does not imply broad stable external Rust Browser Edition parity.
The maintained browser fixture remains the shipped artifact-backed Rust consumer lane.
